### Google Chrome Application
Social Hub - A standalone app for easily surfing between Facebook and Instagram
https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/social-hub/ghbmmfdmaegmffeogibdgaijaelfaijm

IM Hub - Quickly and easily accessing variety of popular chatting apps in one standalone window    
Support: Facebook Messenger, Whatsapp, WeChat, Telegram, Skype, Google Hangouts
https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/im-hub/hbmefbfbophhojlhbgbonngkehnacnke
